data.title: Green Builder Media to host 2 webinars in 2026 on high-performance housing trends. Focus on sustainability.
data.description: Lake City, Colorado - On January 21, 2026, Green Builder Media is launching two informative webinars focused on aiding building professionals and environmentally-conscious consumers in staying up-to-date in the realms of high-performance, health-conscious, and resilient housing. The first webinar will cover...

data.title: Inventor from N.C. develops TURNER TVIS TECH SIGNAL BOOSTER AMPLIFYING WIRES for home antenna systems.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 21, 2026, an inventor from Winston Salem, N.C., shared the development of a new signal booster/amplifying wire for home amplified antenna systems. The TURNER TVIS TECH SIGNAL BOOSTER AMPLIFYING WIRES are designed to enhance signal strength. This innovation aims to improve the performance of standard home amplified antenna systems, potentially enhancing the viewing experience for users.

data.title: Blue Bird Corp (Nasdaq: BLBD) to report fiscal Q1 2026 results on Feb 4; Webcast with executives at 4:30PM ET.
data.description: Blue Bird Corporation (Nasdaq: BLBD), a top provider of electric and environmentally-friendly school buses, is set to announce its fiscal 2026 first quarter financial results on February 4, 2026. Interested individuals can join an audio webcast featuring Blue Bird's President and CEO, John Wyskiel, and CFO, Razvan Radulescu, discussing the outcomes. The webcast is scheduled for 4:30 PM ET on February 4, 2026, and a slide presentation will accompany the discussion. Further details for accessing the webcast will be provided.

data.title: SUI price forecast: Aiming for $1.60-$2.20 by Feb with short-term target of $1.60 and medium-term forecast of $2.00-$2.20. Bullish breakout at $1.57, critical support at $1.42.
data.description: Predictions for SUI's price show a short-term target of $1.60 within a week. Looking ahead, the medium-term forecast for the next month is within the $2.00 to $2.20 range. A bullish breakout is expected if the price reaches $1.57, while a crucial support level stands at $1.42.

data.title: Schwab misses expectations despite increasing clients and trading revenue up by 22% from last year. Stock at critical level.
data.description: Despite missing analyst expectations, Schwab experienced growth by acquiring new clients and engaging investors who traded actively. The trading revenue spiked by 22% compared to the same quarter last year. As a result, the stock is now testing a crucial level despite the mixed views on its performance.

data.title: PPG named on Fortune's ‘World’s Most Admired Companies’ list for 18th year, ranking No. 2 in chemicals industry.
data.description: Headquartered in Pittsburgh, PPG (NYSE:PPG) has secured a spot in Fortune magazine's World’s Most Admired Companies List for the 18th consecutive year. This list, a crucial measure of corporate reputation, showcases esteemed companies across 51 sectors selected through votes from industry insiders. PPG maintained its No. 2 position in the chemicals sector for the third year in a row. The company received top ratings in various categories, affirming its standing in the industry.

data.title: Global healthcare payer network management market projected to grow by USD 5.37 billion from 2025 to 2030 at a CAGR of 15.1%.
data.description: The market for Healthcare Payer Network Management is expected to witness substantial growth in the coming years, with projections indicating a significant increase of USD 5.37 billion from 2025 to 2030. This growth is anticipated to occur at a steady Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.1%. The comprehensive market analysis provides insights into key trends, challenges, and growth drivers, alongside vendor insights encompassing around 25 major players in the industry. This data has been compiled by ResearchAndMarkets.com and is now available for review and consideration.

The bullish breakout level is anticipated to be at $0.37, while a critical support level is identified at $0.28.

data.title: Chicago Auto Show announces finalists for What Drives Her award program. 9th annual event on Feb. 6, 2026.
data.description: The 9th annual What Drives Her networking event and awards program will be hosted on Feb. 6 in Chicago. The event is organized by the Chicago Auto Show in collaboration with A Girls Guide to Cars. This program has been running successfully for nine years and is set to feature a ceremony showcasing achievements and advancements in the auto industry.

data.title: Copilot CLI commands get full reference guide with session management, directory access, model selection, and MCP configuration.  #GitHub #Copilot
data.description: GitHub has recently unveiled a detailed cheat sheet for Copilot CLI slash commands, offering guidance on session management, directory access, model selection, and MCP configuration. This resource is designed to assist users in navigating the various functionalities of Copilot CLI efficiently. The cheat sheet aims to enhance user experience by providing quick and accessible information. For further details, users can consult the full documentation available on GitHub's platform.

data.title: Predicted ARB price: $0.25-$0.28 by Feb 2026. Short-term target: $0.19-$0.20, support at $0.17. Bullish breakout: $0.19.
data.description: Summary of ARB Price Prediction:In the short term, the target price for ARB within one week is estimated to be between $0.19 and $0.20. Looking further ahead to a medium-term forecast of one month, the price is predicted to fall within the range of $0.25 to $0.28. The bullish breakout level is set at $0.19, while the critical support level stands at $0.17. These forecasts provide insights into potential price movements for ARB in the near future.

data.title: Harvard Division of Continuing Education launches Harvard Ideas Symposium, a new learning experience featuring leading faculty.
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, as of January 21, 2026, the Harvard Division of Continuing Education (DCE) revealed the introduction of the Harvard Ideas Symposium. This innovative on-campus program aims to unite intellectually inquisitive individuals with leading minds at Harvard University. The symposium offers an immersive learning experience for participants.
